dashboard.describeToJoin: Describe symptoms to join a group
dashboard.systemWillFind: The system will find people with similar experiences and connect you in a private support group.
dashboard.recentActivityMessage: Marta_Z: Did anyone see a specialist in Kraków?

groups.title: Your groups
groups.subtitle: Choose a group or join a new one
groups.checkConnection: Check your connection and try again later.
groups.noGroups: You don't have any groups yet
groups.noGroupsHint: Describe your symptoms so the system can match you to a community, or create your own group.
groups.notSeeGroup: Don't see your group? Join or create one.
groups.emptyStateNotes1: Empty state: show the message “You don't have any groups yet” + the button “Join / Create”.
groups.emptyStateNotes2: Loading state: show 3–4 gray card skeletons (instead of a list) for a moment.

forum.title: Group forum
forum.subtitle: Member experiences are shown here
forum.titlePlaceholder: E.g. List of recommended pediatric neurologists...
forum.contentPlaceholder: Describe your experiences, share knowledge, ask a question...
forum.visibleToMembers: Post will be visible to all group members
forum.noPostsHint: Be the first to share knowledge or experience with the group.
forum.validationTitleMax: Title can be at most 200 characters
forum.validationContentMin: Content must be at least 20 characters
forum.validationContentMax: Content can be at most 10,000 characters

postDetail.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this post? This will also remove all comments.
postDetail.lockedNotice: 🔒 This post is locked — commenting disabled
postDetail.noComments: No comments. Be the first to comment!

symptoms.title: Describe symptoms
symptoms.subtitle: The system will match you to a group based on your description.
symptoms.hint2: What parts of the body are affected?
symptoms.hint3: How do symptoms affect daily life?
symptoms.hint4: What has already been tested or ruled out?
symptoms.hint5: Do symptoms get worse in certain situations?
symptoms.placeholder: Write about symptoms, diagnosis, daily challenges...
symptoms.validationMin: Description must be at least 100 characters
symptoms.validationMax: Description can be at most 1000 characters
symptoms.loading: Finding a match... (this may take a moment)
symptoms.analyzing: Analyzing description and searching for similar cases...
symptoms.creatingGroup: Creating a new group for you!
symptoms.submitError: An error occurred. Please try again.

profile.title: My Profile
profile.subtitle: Manage account and preferences
profile.noGroup: You're not in any group yet.
profile.dangerZoneDesc: Account deactivation is permanent and irreversible. All your data will be deleted.
profile.deactivateSoon: Account deactivation will be available soon.

messages.title: Messages
messages.subtitle: Private conversations with members
messages.searchToStart: Search by nickname to start a conversation

chat.beFirst: Be the first — write something to the group!
chat.placeholder: Write a message... (Enter = send, Shift+Enter = new line)

groupDrawer.title: Group management
groupDrawer.noGroup: You're not assigned to any group
groupDrawer.fillFormFirst: Fill in the symptoms form first
groupDrawer.noMatchesHint: Add or expand your symptom description to find a group
groupDrawer.fillFormHint: Describe symptoms and the system will match you to a group

groupTile.findGroupHint: Describe your symptoms and join the community

symptomEditor.title: Your symptoms description
symptomEditor.placeholder: Describe your symptoms in your own words...

symptomEditor.expandHint: Click to view and edit the full description

groupMatchMini.newGroupNote: A new group will be created for you. When similar descriptions appear, the algorithm will match you.

report.title: Report content
report.duplicateError: This report has already been submitted.
